reason: WF2 arXiv workflow uses fixed source (arXiv API). Source exploration is not applicable -- arXiv is the sole, dedicated source for this workflow. No coverage gaps addressable by adding new sources.

coverage_analysis.note: Social and Economic gaps are inherent to arXiv's academic focus. These categories are better covered by WF1 (general) and WF3 (Naver News).

summary: Source exploration skipped for WF2 (arXiv-only workflow). arXiv is the sole dedicated source. STEEPs gaps in Social and Economic categories are structural to academic preprint sources and addressed by other workflows.
